highlights.description: Full voice gateway for Telnyx Media Streaming with STTâ†’LLMâ†’TTS pipeline
MMS and RCS messaging support with OmniChat integration

added.description: MMS support with media attachments via `SendMMS`, `SendMMSFrom`, and unified `SendMessage` API
RCS support via Telnyx Messaging Profiles with automatic SMS fallback
OmniChat provider implementing `provider.Provider` for SMS/MMS/RCS messaging integration
Voice gateway implementing `coregateway.Gateway` interface with HTTP/WebSocket server
Session type implementing `coregateway.Session` interface with metrics tracking
JSON webhook handlers for Telnyx call events (`call.initiated`, `call.answered`, `call.hangup`)
WebSocket connection wrapper for Telnyx Media Streaming protocol
Voice pipeline with STTâ†’LLMâ†’TTS processing chain
Voice activity detection and silence-based end-of-speech detection
Barge-in interruption support (immediate, after_sentence, disabled modes)
Provider factory for STT (Deepgram, OpenAI), LLM (Anthropic, OpenAI), TTS (ElevenLabs, OpenAI, Deepgram)
LLM tool calling with configurable handlers

highlights.description: Module rename from omnivoice-telnyx to omni-telnyx with package restructure

documentation.description: Update README, CHANGELOG, and release notes for new module name and import paths

tests.description: Conformance tests for callsystem and transport using `omnivoice-core/providertest`

highlights.description: Initial Telnyx provider for OmniVoice with CallSystem, Transport, and SMS support

added.description: Telnyx CallSystem provider implementing `callsystem.CallSystem` interface
Telnyx SMSProvider implementing `callsystem.SMSProvider` interface
`MakeCall`, `GetCall`, `ListCalls` for call management
`OnIncomingCall` handler for inbound calls with webhook support
`SendSMS` and `SendSMSFrom` for SMS messaging
Call Control API integration: Answer, Hangup, Speak, PlayAudio
Media Streaming support: `StartMediaStreaming`, `StopMediaStreaming`
Real-time transcription: `StartTranscription`, `StopTranscription`
Telnyx Media Streaming transport implementing `transport.Transport` interface
Telnyx TelephonyTransport implementing `transport.TelephonyTransport` interface
WebSocket-based bidirectional audio via `AudioIn()` and `AudioOut()` streams
DTMF event handling with `OnDTMF` callback
`SendMark` and `Clear` for audio synchronization

documentation.description: README with usage examples, architecture diagram, and configuration
v0.1.0 release notes with feature highlights

build.description: Shared CI workflows for lint, test, and SAST
